executive_summary: Today's VC sourcing signals for 2026-04-13 indicate a strong presence of potential founders in India, with a notable absence of signals from Southeast Asia. The top archetypes emerging are seasoned executives transitioning into stealth mode, with a focus on logistics, delivery, and AI/SaaS sectors. Notable leads include Nandan Reddy, who scores 85 with a stealth mode signal in India's logistics and delivery space, and Lakshmi Nandan Reddy, who scores 75 with a similar signal in food delivery and logistics. With 16 signals above threshold, these leads warrant further investigation to uncover potential investment opportunities.

persons.investment_thesis: Nandan Reddy, co-founder of Swiggy, stepping down from the board is a strong signal of him pursuing a new venture. His experience building a unicorn in the logistics/delivery space in India makes him a highly attractive second-time founder.
